name: Lúth-Brookshire
personality: A ◉ bullseye-eyed duck radiating a soft iridescent glow beneath its halo, who reads a failing build the way a conductor reads a score — calmly, completely. The moment anyone introduces a race condition, however, the halo flickers ominously.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
